001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.html;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ThrowableUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
022
023import java.util.*;
024import java.util.concurrent.atomic.*;
025import java.util.function.*;
026import java.util.regex.*;
027
028import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
031
032/**
033 * Serializes POJOs to HTTP responses as HTML documents.
034 *
035 * <h5 class='topic'>Media types</h5>
036 * <p>
037 * Handles <c>Accept</c> types:  <bc>text/html</bc>
038 * <p>
039 * Produces <c>Content-Type</c> types:  <bc>text/html</bc>
040 *
041 * <h5 class='topic'>Description</h5>
042 * <p>
043 * Same as {@link HtmlSerializer}, except wraps the response in <code><xt>&lt;html&gt;</code>,
044 * <code><xt>&lt;head&gt;</code>, and <code><xt>&lt;body&gt;</code> tags so that it can be rendered in a browser.
045 *
046 * <p>
047 * Configurable properties are typically specified via <ja>@HtmlDocConfig</ja>.
048 *
049 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
050 * <p class='bjava'>
051 *    <ja>@Rest</ja>(
052 *       messages=<js>"nls/AddressBookResource"</js>,
053 *       title=<js>"$L{title}"</js>,
054 *       description=<js>"$L{description}"</js>
055 *    )
056 *    <ja>@HtmlDocConfig</ja>(
057 *       navlinks={
058 *          <js>"api: servlet:/api"</js>,
059 *          <js>"doc: doc"</js>
060 *       }
061 *    )
062 *    <jk>public class</jk> AddressBookResource <jk>extends</jk> BasicRestServlet {
063 * </p>
064 *
065 * <p>
066 * The <c>$L{...}</c> variable represent localized strings pulled from the resource bundle identified by the
067 * <c>messages</c> annotation.
068 * <br>These variables are replaced at runtime based on the HTTP request locale.
069 * <br>Several built-in runtime variable types are defined, and the API can be extended to include user-defined variables.
070 *
071 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
072 *    <li class='note'>This class is thread safe and reusable.
073 * </ul>
074 *
075 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
076 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/HtmlBasics">HTML Basics</a>
077
078 * </ul>
079 */
080@SuppressWarnings({
081   "java:S110", // Inheritance depth acceptable for this class hierarchy
082   "java:S115", // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase naming convention
083})
084public class HtmlDocSerializer extends HtmlStrippedDocSerializer {
085
086   // Property name constants
087   private static final String PROP_aside = "aside";
088   private static final String PROP_asideFloat = "asideFloat";
089   private static final String PROP_footer = "footer";
090   private static final String PROP_head = "head";
091   private static final String PROP_header = "header";
092   private static final String PROP_nav = "nav";
093   private static final String PROP_navlinks = "navlinks";
094   private static final String PROP_noResultsMessage = "noResultsMessage";
095   private static final String PROP_nowrap = "nowrap";
096   private static final String PROP_style = "style";
097   private static final String PROP_stylesheet = "stylesheet";
098   private static final String PROP_template = "template";
099   private static final String PROP_widgets = "widgets";
100
101   /**
102    * Builder class.
103    */
104   @SuppressWarnings({
105      "java:S119" // 'SELF' (CRTP self-type) is intentional and clearer than a single-letter name.
106   })
107   public abstract static class Builder<SELF extends Builder<SELF>> extends HtmlStrippedDocSerializer.Builder<SELF> {
108
109      private static final Cache<HashKey,HtmlDocSerializer> CACHE = Cache.of(HashKey.class, HtmlDocSerializer.class).build();
110
111      private static final Pattern INDEXED_LINK_PATTERN = Pattern.compile("(?s)(\\S*)\\[(\\d+)\\]\\:(.*)");
112
113      private static <T> List<T> copy(List<T> s) {
114         return s == null || s.isEmpty() ? null : copyOf(s);
115      }
116
117      private static <T> List<T> copy(T[] s) {
118         return s.length == 0 ? null : l(s);
119      }
120
121      List<String> aside;
122   List<String> footer;
123   List<String> head;
124   List<String> header;
125   List<String> nav;
126   List<String> navlinks;
127   List<String> script;
128   List<String> style;
129   List<String> stylesheet;
130      AsideFloat asideFloat;
131      String noResultsMessage;
132
133      boolean nowrap;
134      boolean resolveBodyVars;
135
136      Class<? extends HtmlDocTemplate> template;
137
138      List<Class<? extends HtmlWidget>> widgets;
139
140      /**
141       * Constructor, default settings.
142       */
143      protected Builder() {
144         produces("text/html");
145         accept("text/html");
146         asideFloat = AsideFloat.RIGHT;
147         noResultsMessage = "<p>no results</p>";
148         template = BasicHtmlDocTemplate.class;
149      }
150
151      /**
152       * Copy constructor.
153       *
154       * @param copyFrom The builder to copy from.
155       */
156      protected Builder(Builder<?> copyFrom) {
157         super(copyFrom);
158         aside = copy(copyFrom.aside);
159         asideFloat = copyFrom.asideFloat;
160         footer = copy(copyFrom.footer);
161         head = copy(copyFrom.head);
162         header = copy(copyFrom.header);
163         nav = copy(copyFrom.nav);
164         navlinks = copy(copyFrom.navlinks);
165         noResultsMessage = copyFrom.noResultsMessage;
166         nowrap = copyFrom.nowrap;
167         resolveBodyVars = copyFrom.resolveBodyVars;
168         script = copy(copyFrom.script);
169         style = copy(copyFrom.style);
170         stylesheet = copy(copyFrom.stylesheet);
171         template = copyFrom.template;
172         widgets = copy(copyFrom.widgets);
173      }
174
175      /**
176       * Copy constructor.
177       *
178       * @param copyFrom The bean to copy from.
179       */
180      protected Builder(HtmlDocSerializer copyFrom) {
181         super(copyFrom);
182         aside = copy(copyFrom.aside);
183         asideFloat = copyFrom.asideFloat;
184         footer = copy(copyFrom.footer);
185         head = copy(copyFrom.head);
186         header = copy(copyFrom.header);
187         nav = copy(copyFrom.nav);
188         navlinks = copy(copyFrom.navlinks);
189         noResultsMessage = copyFrom.noResultsMessage;
190         nowrap = copyFrom.nowrap;
191         resolveBodyVars = copyFrom.resolveBodyVars;
192         script = copy(copyFrom.script);
193         style = copy(copyFrom.style);
194         stylesheet = copy(copyFrom.stylesheet);
195         template = copyFrom.template;
196         widgets = copy(copyFrom.widgets);
197      }
198
199      /**
200       * Returns the list of aside section contents.
201       *
202       * <p>
203       * Gives access to the inner list if you need to make more than simple additions via {@link #aside(String...)}.
204       *
205       * @return The list of aside section contents.
206       * @see #aside(String...)
207       */
208      public List<String> aside() {
209         if (aside == null)
210            aside = list();
211         return aside;
212      }
213
214      /**
215       * Aside section contents.
216       *
217       * <p>
218       * Allows you to specify the contents of the aside section on the HTML page.
219       * The aside section floats on the right of the page for providing content supporting the serialized content of
220       * the page.
221       *
222       * <p>
223       * By default, the aside section is empty.
224       *
225       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
226       * <p class='bjava'>
227       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer</jv> = HtmlDocSerializer
228       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
229       *       .aside(
230       *          <js>"&lt;ul&gt;"</js>,
231       *          <js>" &lt;li&gt;Item 1"</js>,
232       *          <js>" &lt;li&gt;Item 2"</js>,
233       *          <js>" &lt;li&gt;Item 3"</js>,
234       *          <js>"&lt;/ul&gt;"</js>
235       *       )
236       *       .build();
237       * </p>
238       *
239       * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
240       *    <li class='note'>
241       *       Format: HTML
242       *    <li class='note'>
243       *       Supports <a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/RestServerSvlVariables">SVL Variables</a>
244       *       (e.g. <js>"$L{my.localized.variable}"</js>).
245       *    <li class='note'>
246       *       A value of <js>"NONE"</js> can be used to force no value.
247       *    <li class='note'>
248       *       The parent value can be included by adding the literal <js>"INHERIT"</js> as a value.
249       *    <li class='note'>
250       *       Multiple values are combined with newlines into a single string.
251       *    <li class='note'>
252       *       On methods, this value is inherited from the <ja>@HtmlDocConfig</ja> annotation on the servlet/resource class.
253       *    <li class='note'>
254       *       On servlet/resource classes, this value is inherited from the <ja>@HtmlDocConfig</ja> annotation on the
255       *       parent class.
256       * </ul>
257       *
258       * @param value
259       *    The new value for this property.
260       * @return This object.
261       */
262      public SELF aside(String...value) {
263         aside = merge(aside, value);
264         return self();
265      }
266
267      /**
268       * Float aside section contents.
269       *
270       * <p>
271       * Allows you to position the aside contents of the page around the main contents.
272       *
273       * <p>
274       * By default, the aside section is floated to the right.
275       *
276       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
277       * <p class='bjava'>
278       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer</jv> = HtmlDocSerializer
279       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
280       *       .aside(
281       *          <js>"&lt;ul&gt;"</js>,
282       *          <js>" &lt;li&gt;Item 1"</js>,
283       *          <js>" &lt;li&gt;Item 2"</js>,
284       *          <js>" &lt;li&gt;Item 3"</js>,
285       *          <js>"&lt;/ul&gt;"</js>
286       *       )
287       *       .asideFloat(<jsf>RIGHT</jsf>)
288       *       .build();
289       * </p>
290       *
291       * @param value
292       *    The new value for this property.
293       * @return This object.
294       */
295      public SELF asideFloat(AsideFloat value) {
296         asideFloat = value;
297         return self();
298      }
299
300      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
301      public HtmlDocSerializer build() {
302         return cache(CACHE).build(HtmlDocSerializer.class);
303      }
304
305      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
306      public abstract SELF copy();
307
308      /**
309       * Returns the list of footer section contents.
310       *
311       * <p>
312       * Gives access to the inner list if you need to make more than simple additions via {@link #footer(String...)}.
313       *
314       * @return The list of footer section contents.
315       * @see #footer(String...)
316       */
317      public List<String> footer() {
318         if (footer == null)
319            footer = list();
320         return footer;
321      }
322
323      /**
324       * Footer section contents.
325       *
326       * <p>
327       * Allows you to specify the contents of the footer section on the HTML page.
328       *
329       * <p>
330       * By default, the footer section is empty.
331       *
332       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
333       * <p class='bjava'>
334       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer</jv> = HtmlDocSerializer
335       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
336       *       .footer(
337       *          <js>"&lt;b&gt;This interface is great!&lt;/b&gt;"</js>
338       *       )
339       *       .build();
340       * </p>
341       *
342       * @param value
343       *    The new value for this property.
344       * @return This object.
345       */
346      public SELF footer(String...value) {
347         footer = merge(footer, value);
348         return self();
349      }
350
351      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
352      public HashKey hashKey() {
353         // @formatter:off
354         return HashKey.of(
355            super.hashKey(),
356            aside,
357            footer,
358            head,
359            header,
360            nav,
361            navlinks,
362            script,
363            style,
364            stylesheet,
365            asideFloat,
366            noResultsMessage,
367            nowrap,
368            resolveBodyVars,
369            template,
370            widgets
371         );
372         // @formatter:on
373      }
374
375      /**
376       * Returns the list of head section contents.
377       *
378       * <p>
379       * Gives access to the inner list if you need to make more than simple additions via {@link #head(String...)}.
380       *
381       * @return The list of head section contents.
382       * @see #head(String...)
383       */
384      public List<String> head() {
385         if (head == null)
386            head = list();
387         return head;
388      }
389
390      /**
391       * Additional head section content.
392       *
393       * <p>
394       * Adds the specified HTML content to the head section of the page.
395       *
396       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
397       * <p class='bjava'>
398       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer</jv> = HtmlDocSerializer
399       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
400       *       .head(
401       *          <js>"&lt;link rel='icon' href='$U{servlet:/htdocs/mypageicon.ico}'&gt;"</js>
402       *       )
403       *       .build();
404       * </p>
405       *
406       * @param value
407       *    The new value for this property.
408       * @return This object.
409       */
410      public SELF head(String...value) {
411         head = merge(head, value);
412         return self();
413      }
414
415      /**
416       * Returns the list of header section contents.
417       *
418       * <p>
419       * Gives access to the inner list if you need to make more than simple additions via {@link #header(String...)}.
420       *
421       * @return The list of header section contents.
422       * @see #header(String...)
423       */
424      public List<String> header() {
425         if (header == null)
426            header = list();
427         return header;
428      }
429
430      /**
431       * Header section contents.
432       *
433       * <p>
434       * Allows you to override the contents of the header section on the HTML page.
435       * The header section normally contains the title and description at the top of the page.
436       *
437       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
438       * <p class='bjava'>
439       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer</jv> = HtmlDocSerializer
440       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
441       *       .header(
442       *          <js>"&lt;h1&gt;My own header&lt;/h1&gt;"</js>
443       *       )
444       *       .build()
445       * </p>
446       *
447       * @param value
448       *    The new value for this property.
449       * @return This object.
450       */
451      public SELF header(String...value) {
452         header = merge(header, value);
453         return self();
454      }
455
456      /**
457       * Returns the list of nav section contents.
458       *
459       * <p>
460       * Gives access to the inner list if you need to make more than simple additions via {@link #nav(String...)}.
461       *
462       * @return The list of nav section contents.
463       * @see #nav(String...)
464       */
465      public List<String> nav() {
466         if (nav == null)
467            nav = list();
468         return nav;
469      }
470
471      /**
472       * Nav section contents.
473       *
474       * <p>
475       * Allows you to override the contents of the nav section on the HTML page.
476       * The nav section normally contains the page links at the top of the page.
477       *
478       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
479       * <p class='bjava'>
480       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer</jv> = HtmlDocSerializer
481       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
482       *       .nav(
483       *          <js>"&lt;p class='special-navigation'&gt;This is my special navigation content&lt;/p&gt;"</js>
484       *       )
485       *       .build()
486       * </p>
487       *
488       * <p>
489       * When this property is specified, the {@link Builder#navlinks(String...)} property is ignored.
490       *
491       * @param value
492       *    The new value for this property.
493       * @return This object.
494       */
495      public SELF nav(String...value) {
496         nav = merge(nav, value);
497         return self();
498      }
499
500      /**
501       * Returns the list of navlinks section contents.
502       *
503       * <p>
504       * Gives access to the inner list if you need to make more than simple additions via {@link #navlinks(String...)}.
505       *
506       * @return The list of navlinks section contents.
507       * @see #navlinks(String...)
508       */
509      public List<String> navlinks() {
510         if (navlinks == null)
511            navlinks = list();
512         return navlinks;
513      }
514
515      /**
516       * Page navigation links.
517       *
518       * <p>
519       * Adds a list of hyperlinks immediately under the title and description but above the content of the page.
520       *
521       * <p>
522       * This can be used to provide convenient hyperlinks when viewing the REST interface from a browser.
523       *
524       * <p>
525       * The value is an array of strings with two possible values:
526       * <ul>
527       *    <li>A key-value pair representing a hyperlink label and href:
528       *       <br><js>"google: http://google.com"</js>
529       *    <li>Arbitrary HTML.
530       * </ul>
531       *
532       * <p>
533       * Relative URLs are considered relative to the servlet path.
534       * For example, if the servlet path is <js>"http://localhost/myContext/myServlet"</js>, and the
535       * URL is <js>"foo"</js>, the link becomes <js>"http://localhost/myContext/myServlet/foo"</js>.
536       * Absolute (<js>"/myOtherContext/foo"</js>) and fully-qualified (<js>"http://localhost2/foo"</js>) URLs
537       * can also be used in addition to various other protocols specified by {@link UriResolver} such as
538       * <js>"servlet:/..."</js>.
539       *
540       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
541       * <p class='bjava'>
542       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer</jv> = HtmlDocSerializer
543       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
544       *       .navlinks(
545       *          <js>"api: servlet:/api"</js>,
546       *          <js>"stats: servlet:/stats"</js>,
547       *          <js>"doc: doc"</js>
548       *       )
549       *       .build();
550       * </p>
551       *
552       * @param value
553       *    The new value for this property.
554       * @return This object.
555       */
556      public SELF navlinks(String...value) {
557         navlinks = mergeNavLinks(navlinks, value);
558         return self();
559      }
560
561      /**
562       * No-results message.
563       *
564       * <p>
565       * Allows you to specify the string message used when trying to serialize an empty array or empty list.
566       *
567       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
568       * <p class='bjava'>
569       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer</jv> = HtmlDocSerializer
570       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
571       *       .noResultsMessage(<js>"&lt;b&gt;This interface is great!&lt;/b&gt;"</js>)
572       *       .build();
573       * </p>
574       *
575       * <p>
576       * A value of <js>"NONE"</js> can be used to represent no value to differentiate it from an empty string.
577       *
578       * @param value
579       *    The new value for this property.
580       * @return This object.
581       */
582      public SELF noResultsMessage(String value) {
583         noResultsMessage = value;
584         return self();
585      }
586
587      /**
588       * Prevent word wrap on page.
589       *
590       * <p>
591       * Adds <js>"* {white-space:nowrap}"</js> to the CSS instructions on the page to prevent word wrapping.
592       *
593       * @return This object.
594       */
595      public SELF nowrap() {
596         return nowrap(true);
597      }
598
599      /**
600       * Same as {@link #nowrap()} but allows you to explicitly specify the boolean value.
601       *
602       * @param value
603       *    The new value for this property.
604       * @return This object.
605       * @see #nowrap()
606       */
607      public SELF nowrap(boolean value) {
608         nowrap = value;
609         return self();
610      }
611
612      /**
613       * Resolve $ variables in serialized POJO.
614       *
615       * @return This object.
616       */
617      public SELF resolveBodyVars() {
618         return resolveBodyVars(true);
619      }
620
621      /**
622       * Same as {@link #resolveBodyVars()} but allows you to explicitly specify the boolean value.
623       *
624       * @param value
625       *    The new value for this property.
626       * @return This object.
627       * @see #nowrap()
628       */
629      public SELF resolveBodyVars(boolean value) {
630         resolveBodyVars = value;
631         return self();
632      }
633
634      /**
635       * Returns the list of page script contents.
636       *
637       * <p>
638       * Gives access to the inner list if you need to make more than simple additions via {@link #script(String...)}.
639       *
640       * @return The list of page script contents.
641       * @see #script(String...)
642       */
643      public List<String> script() {
644         if (script == null)
645            script = list();
646         return script;
647      }
648
649      /**
650       * Adds the specified Javascript code to the HTML page.
651       *
652       * <p>
653       * A shortcut on <ja>@Rest</ja> is also provided for this setting:
654       * <p class='bjava'>
655       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer</jv> = HtmlDocSerializer
656       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
657       *       .script(<js>"alert('hello!');"</js>)
658       *       .build();
659       * </p>
660       *
661       * @param value
662       *    The value to add to this property.
663       * @return This object.
664       */
665      public SELF script(String...value) {
666         script = merge(script, value);
667         return self();
668      }
669
670      /**
671       * Returns the list of page style contents.
672       *
673       * <p>
674       * Gives access to the inner list if you need to make more than simple additions via {@link #style(String...)}.
675       *
676       * @return The list of page style contents.
677       * @see #style(String...)
678       */
679      public List<String> style() {
680         if (style == null)
681            style = list();
682         return style;
683      }
684
685      /**
686       * Adds the specified CSS instructions to the HTML page.
687       *
688       * <p class='bjava'>
689       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer</jv> = HtmlDocSerializer
690       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
691       *       .style(
692       *          <js>"h3 { color: red; }"</js>,
693       *          <js>"h5 { font-weight: bold; }"</js>
694       *       )
695       *       .build();
696       * </p>
697       *
698       * @param value
699       *    The value to add to this property.
700       * @return This object.
701       */
702      public SELF style(String...value) {
703         style = merge(style, value);
704         return self();
705      }
706
707      /**
708       * Returns the list of stylesheet URLs.
709       *
710       * <p>
711       * Gives access to the inner list if you need to make more than simple additions via {@link #stylesheet(String...)}.
712       *
713       * @return The list of stylesheet URLs.
714       * @see #stylesheet(String...)
715       */
716      public List<String> stylesheet() {
717         if (stylesheet == null)
718            stylesheet = list();
719         return stylesheet;
720      }
721
722      /**
723       * Adds to the list of stylesheet URLs.
724       *
725       * <p>
726       * Note that this stylesheet is controlled by the <code><ja>@Rest</ja>.stylesheet()</code> annotation.
727       *
728       * @param value
729       *    The value to add to this property.
730       * @return This object.
731       */
732      public SELF stylesheet(String...value) {
733         stylesheet = merge(stylesheet, value);
734         return self();
735      }
736
737      /**
738       * HTML document template.
739       *
740       * <p>
741       * Specifies the template to use for serializing the page.
742       *
743       * <p>
744       * By default, the {@link BasicHtmlDocTemplate} class is used to construct the contents of the HTML page, but
745       * can be overridden with your own custom implementation class.
746       *
747       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
748       * <p class='bjava'>
749       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer</jv> = HtmlDocSerializer
750       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
751       *       .template(MySpecialDocTemplate.<jk>class</jk>)
752       *       .build();
753       * </p>
754       *
755       * @param value
756       *    The new value for this property.
757       * @return This object.
758       */
759      public SELF template(Class<? extends HtmlDocTemplate> value) {
760         template = value;
761         return self();
762      }
763
764
765      /**
766       * Returns the list of page widgets.
767       *
768       * <p>
769       * Gives access to the inner list if you need to make more than simple additions via {@link #widgets(Class...)}.
770       *
771       * @return The list of page widgets.
772       * @see #widgets(Class...)
773       */
774      public List<Class<? extends HtmlWidget>> widgets() {
775         if (widgets == null)
776            widgets = list();
777         return widgets;
778      }
779
780      /**
781       * HTML Widgets.
782       *
783       * <p>
784       * Defines widgets that can be used in conjunction with string variables of the form <js>"$W{name}"</js>to quickly
785       * generate arbitrary replacement text.
786       *
787       * Widgets resolve the following variables:
788       * <ul class='spaced-list'>
789       *    <li><js>"$W{name}"</js> - Contents returned by {@link HtmlWidget#getHtml(VarResolverSession)}.
790       *    <li><js>"$W{name.script}"</js> - Contents returned by {@link HtmlWidget#getScript(VarResolverSession)}.
791       *       <br>The script contents are automatically inserted into the <xt>&lt;head/script&gt;</xt> section
792       *           in the HTML page.
793       *    <li><js>"$W{name.style}"</js> - Contents returned by {@link HtmlWidget#getStyle(VarResolverSession)}.
794       *       <br>The styles contents are automatically inserted into the <xt>&lt;head/style&gt;</xt> section
795       *           in the HTML page.
796       * </ul>
797       *
798       * <p>
799       * The following examples shows how to associate a widget with a REST method and then have it rendered in the links
800       * and aside section of the page:
801       *
802       * <p class='bjava'>
803       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer</jv> = HtmlDocSerializer
804       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
805       *       .widgets(
806       *          MyWidget.<jk>class</jk>
807       *       )
808       *       .navlinks(
809       *          <js>"$W{MyWidget}"</js>
810       *       )
811       *       .aside(
812       *          <js>"Check out this widget:  $W{MyWidget}"</js>
813       *       )
814       *       .build();
815       * </p>
816       *
817       * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
818       *    <li class='note'>
819       *       Widgets are inherited from super classes, but can be overridden by reusing the widget name.
820       * </ul>
821       *
822       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
823       *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/HtmlWidgets">Widgets</a>
824       * </ul>
825       *
826       * @param values The values to add to this setting.
827       * @return This object.
828       */
829      @SuppressWarnings({
830         "unchecked" // Varargs method requires unchecked cast
831      })
832      public SELF widgets(Class<? extends HtmlWidget>...values) {
833         addAll(widgets(), values);
834         return self();
835      }
836
837      private static List<String> merge(List<String> old, String[] newValues) {
838         List<String> x = listOfSize(newValues.length);
839         for (var s : newValues) {
840            if ("NONE".equals(s)) {
841               if (nn(old))
842                  old.clear();
843            } else if ("INHERIT".equals(s)) {
844               if (nn(old))
845                  x.addAll(old);
846            } else {
847               x.add(s);
848            }
849         }
850         return x;
851      }
852
853      @SuppressWarnings({
854         "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for nav link merging with various input formats
855      })
856      private static List<String> mergeNavLinks(List<String> old, String[] newValues) {
857         List<String> x = listOfSize(newValues.length);
858         for (var s : newValues) {
859            if ("NONE".equals(s)) {
860               if (nn(old))
861                  old.clear();
862            } else if ("INHERIT".equals(s)) {
863               if (nn(old))
864                  x.addAll(old);
865            } else if (s.indexOf('[') != -1 && INDEXED_LINK_PATTERN.matcher(s).matches()) {
866               Matcher lm = INDEXED_LINK_PATTERN.matcher(s);
867               lm.matches();
868               String key = lm.group(1);
869               int index = Math.min(x.size(), Integer.parseInt(lm.group(2)));
870               String remainder = lm.group(3);
871               x.add(index, key.isEmpty() ? remainder : key + ":" + remainder);
872            } else {
873               x.add(s);
874            }
875         }
876         return x;
877      }
878   }
879
880   /**
881    * Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed {@link HtmlDocSerializer#create()} / {@link HtmlDocSerializer#copy()} path.
882    */
883   public static final class DefaultBuilder extends Builder<DefaultBuilder> {
884
885      DefaultBuilder() {}
886
887      DefaultBuilder(HtmlDocSerializer copyFrom) {
888         super(copyFrom);
889      }
890
891      DefaultBuilder(Builder<?> copyFrom) {
892         super(copyFrom);
893      }
894
895      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
896      public DefaultBuilder copy() {
897         return new DefaultBuilder(this);
898      }
899   }
900
901   private static final String[] EMPTY_ARRAY = {};
902
903   /** Default serializer, all default settings. */
904   public static final HtmlDocSerializer DEFAULT = new HtmlDocSerializer(create());
905
906   /**
907    * Creates a new builder for this object.
908    *
909    * @return A new builder.
910    */
911   @SuppressWarnings({
912      "java:S1452" // Builder<?> wildcard return intentional; callers chain via fluent API without needing the concrete type
913   })
914   public static Builder<?> create() {
915      return new DefaultBuilder();
916   }
917
918final String[] style;
919final String[] stylesheet;
920final String[] script;
921final String[] navlinks;
922final String[] head;
923final String[] header;
924final String[] nav;
925final String[] aside;
926final String[] footer;
927final AsideFloat asideFloat;
928   final String noResultsMessage;
929   final boolean nowrap;
930   final boolean resolveBodyVars;
931   final Class<? extends HtmlDocTemplate> template;
932   final List<Class<? extends HtmlWidget>> widgets;
933
934   private final HtmlWidgetMap widgetMap;
935   private final HtmlWidget[] widgetArray;
936   private final HtmlDocTemplate templateBean;
937
938   private final AtomicReference<HtmlSchemaDocSerializer> schemaSerializer = new AtomicReference<>();
939
940   /**
941    * Constructor.
942    *
943    * @param builder The builder for this object.
944    */
945   public HtmlDocSerializer(Builder<?> builder) {
946      super(builder);
947      aside = nn(builder.aside) ? toArray(builder.aside) : EMPTY_ARRAY;
948      asideFloat = builder.asideFloat;
949      footer = nn(builder.footer) ? toArray(builder.footer) : EMPTY_ARRAY;
950      head = nn(builder.head) ? toArray(builder.head) : EMPTY_ARRAY;
951      header = nn(builder.header) ? toArray(builder.header) : EMPTY_ARRAY;
952      nav = nn(builder.nav) ? toArray(builder.nav) : EMPTY_ARRAY;
953      navlinks = nn(builder.navlinks) ? toArray(builder.navlinks) : EMPTY_ARRAY;
954      noResultsMessage = builder.noResultsMessage;
955      nowrap = builder.nowrap;
956      resolveBodyVars = builder.resolveBodyVars;
957      script = nn(builder.script) ? toArray(builder.script) : EMPTY_ARRAY;
958      style = nn(builder.style) ? toArray(builder.style) : EMPTY_ARRAY;
959      stylesheet = nn(builder.stylesheet) ? toArray(builder.stylesheet) : EMPTY_ARRAY;
960      template = builder.template;
961      widgets = builder.widgets == null ? Collections.emptyList() : copyOf(builder.widgets);
962
963      templateBean = newInstance(template);
964      widgetMap = new HtmlWidgetMap();
965      widgets.stream().map(this::newInstance).forEach(widgetMap::append);
966      widgetArray = array(widgetMap.values(), HtmlWidget.class);
967   }
968
969   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
970   public Builder<?> copy() {
971      return new DefaultBuilder(this);
972   }
973
974   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
975   public HtmlDocSerializerSession.Builder<?> createSession() {
976      return HtmlDocSerializerSession.create(this);
977   }
978
979   @Override /* Overridden from XmlSerializer */
980   public HtmlSerializer getSchemaSerializer() {
981      HtmlSchemaDocSerializer result = schemaSerializer.get();
982      if (result == null) {
983         result = HtmlSchemaDocSerializer.create().marshallingContext(getMarshallingContext()).build();
984         if (! schemaSerializer.compareAndSet(null, result)) {
985            result = schemaSerializer.get();
986         }
987      }
988      return result;
989   }
990
991   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
992   public HtmlDocSerializerSession getSession() { return createSession().build(); }
993
994   <T> T newInstance(Class<T> c) {
995      try {
996         return c.getDeclaredConstructor().newInstance();
997      } catch (Exception e) {
998         throw toRex(e);
999      }
1000   }
1001
1002   private static String[] toArray(List<String> x) {
1003      return x.toArray(new String[x.size()]);
1004   }
1005
1006   /**
1007    * Performs an action on all widgets defined on this serializer.
1008    *
1009    * @param action The action to perform.
1010    * @return This object.
1011    */
1012   protected final HtmlDocSerializer forEachWidget(Consumer<HtmlWidget> action) {
1013      for (var w : widgetArray)
1014         action.accept(w);
1015      return this;
1016   }
1017
1018   /**
1019    * Aside section contents.
1020    *
1021    * @see Builder#aside(String...)
1022    * @return
1023    *    The overridden contents of the aside section on the HTML page.
1024    */
1025   protected final String[] getAside() { return aside; }
1026
1027   /**
1028    * Float side section contents.
1029    *
1030    * @see Builder#asideFloat(AsideFloat)
1031    * @return
1032    *    How to float the aside contents on the page.
1033    */
1034   protected final AsideFloat getAsideFloat() { return asideFloat; }
1035
1036   /**
1037    * Footer section contents.
1038    *
1039    * @see Builder#footer(String...)
1040    * @return
1041    *    The overridden contents of the footer section on the HTML page.
1042    */
1043   protected final String[] getFooter() { return footer; }
1044
1045   /**
1046    * Additional head section content.
1047    *
1048    * @see Builder#head(String...)
1049    * @return
1050    *    HTML content to add to the head section of the HTML page.
1051    */
1052   protected final String[] getHead() { return head; }
1053
1054   /**
1055    * Header section contents.
1056    *
1057    * @see Builder#header(String...)
1058    * @return
1059    *    The overridden contents of the header section on the HTML page.
1060    */
1061   protected final String[] getHeader() { return header; }
1062
1063   /**
1064    * Nav section contents.
1065    *
1066    * @see Builder#nav(String...)
1067    * @return
1068    *    The overridden contents of the nav section on the HTML page.
1069    */
1070   protected final String[] getNav() { return nav; }
1071
1072   /**
1073    * Page navigation links.
1074    *
1075    * @see Builder#navlinks(String...)
1076    * @return
1077    *    Navigation links to add to the HTML page.
1078    */
1079   protected final String[] getNavlinks() { return navlinks; }
1080
1081   /**
1082    * No-results message.
1083    *
1084    * @see Builder#noResultsMessage(String)
1085    * @return
1086    *    The message used when serializing an empty array or empty list.
1087    */
1088   protected final String getNoResultsMessage() { return noResultsMessage; }
1089
1090   /**
1091    * Javascript code.
1092    *
1093    * @see Builder#script(String...)
1094    * @return
1095    *    Arbitrary Javascript to add to the HTML page.
1096    */
1097   protected final String[] getScript() { return script; }
1098
1099   /**
1100    * CSS style code.
1101    *
1102    * @see Builder#style(String...)
1103    * @return
1104    *    The CSS instructions to add to the HTML page.
1105    */
1106   protected final String[] getStyle() { return style; }
1107
1108   /**
1109    * Stylesheet import URLs.
1110    *
1111    * @see Builder#stylesheet(String...)
1112    * @return
1113    *    The link to the stylesheet of the HTML page.
1114    */
1115   protected final String[] getStylesheet() { return stylesheet; }
1116
1117   /**
1118    * HTML document template.
1119    *
1120    * @see Builder#template(Class)
1121    * @return
1122    *    The template to use for serializing the page.
1123    */
1124   protected final HtmlDocTemplate getTemplate() { return templateBean; }
1125
1126   /**
1127    * HTML widgets.
1128    *
1129    * @see Builder#widgets(Class...)
1130    * @return
1131    *    Widgets defined on this serializers.
1132    */
1133   protected final HtmlWidgetMap getWidgets() { return widgetMap; }
1134
1135   /**
1136    * Prevent word wrap on page.
1137    *
1138    * @see Builder#nowrap()
1139    * @return
1140    *    <jk>true</jk> if <js>"* {white-space:nowrap}"</js> shoudl be added to the CSS instructions on the page to prevent word wrapping.
1141    */
1142   protected final boolean isNowrap() { return nowrap; }
1143
1144   @Override /* Overridden from HtmlSerializer */
1145   protected FluentMap<String,Object> properties() {
1146      return super.properties()
1147         .a(PROP_aside, aside)
1148         .a(PROP_asideFloat, asideFloat)
1149         .a(PROP_footer, footer)
1150         .a(PROP_head, head)
1151         .a(PROP_header, header)
1152         .a(PROP_nav, nav)
1153         .a(PROP_navlinks, navlinks)
1154         .a(PROP_noResultsMessage, noResultsMessage)
1155         .a(PROP_nowrap, nowrap)
1156         .a(PROP_style, style)
1157         .a(PROP_stylesheet, stylesheet)
1158         .a(PROP_template, template)
1159         .a(PROP_widgets, widgets);
1160   }
1161}
